settings.description: Lightweight open-ear design with a secure fit for all-day comfort and awareness of your surroundings. A 16 mm dynamic driver delivers deep, energizing bass, while AI-enhanced noise reduction keeps calls clear and natural. Up to 45 hours of battery life, stable low-latency wireless connection, and targeted audio design for reduced sound leakage complete the experience.

settings.specs_table_1:
Frequency Response | 20 Hz - 20 kHz
Driver Size | 16 mm
Earbuds Type | Open Wearable Earbuds
Connectivity | Wireless (Bluetooth)
BT Version | 6.0
BT Range | 10 m
Touch Controls | Yes
settings.specs_table_2:
Earbud Battery Type | 35 mAh LiPo Each
Charging Case Battery Type | 260 mAh LiPo
Working Time | Up to 45 Hours
Standby Time | Up to 180 Day
Charging Time | Approx. 1.5 Hours
Charging Interface | USB-C
Weight | 56 ± 2 g
